creator: tate@tateoka.org
text:
editors/mule (may be other variants, at least japanese/mule-canna) can
not compile in ports tree.

Fix: 

I have no idea.  Binary packages can be installed.  However,
it dumps core in X window environment reported as ports/114132.
How-To-Repeat: 
leaf# cd /usr/ports/editors/mule
leaf# make install
  [snip]
===>  Installing for mule-2.3_5
===>   mule-2.3_5 depends on file: /usr/local/share/mule/19.34/lisp/mule.el - not found
===>    Verifying install for /usr/local/share/mule/19.34/lisp/mule.el in /usr/ports/editors/mule-common
===>  mule-common-2.3_5 First you should build install a port for mule except mule-common.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/mule-common.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/mule.
leaf#
